title: resolve_sast_evaluate_mr_readiness_response
description: Response schema for the SAST vulnerability resolution agent that evaluates merge request readiness and reports benchmark metrics.

merge_request_url.description: The merge request URL extracted from the git operations result, or constructed from the repository URL and workflow ID when not found.

readiness_detection_score.description: The fix readiness score as a decimal value represented as a string, between "0.0" and "1.0".
